filesChanged.description: Added embedded-sprint branch: safeParse each spec.sprints entry; if all valid, normalize status→proposed, rebind specId, deterministic id, saveContract; any parse/save failure → whole-set feature-derived fallback.
Added clearContractsForSpec(projectRoot, specId) — deletes .bober/contracts/*.json whose parsed specId matches.
runPlanCommand clears-then-materializes after a ready (non-clarification) plan; printPlan hint changed from sprint to run.
Added runPlanCommand tests S2-C4/C5/C6 (mocks runPlanner + config loader).

commits: 36de025 - bober(sprint-2): embedded-sprint materialization + eager plan wiring
notes: tsc --noEmit clean; eslint 0 errors (2 pre-existing warnings); full suite Tests 6 failed | 2365 passed | 3 skipped — the 6 are pre-existing cockpit-integration E2E MCP failures, unrelated. contract-materialization.test.ts 7/7; plan.test.ts 8/8. NOTE for evaluator: hint was changed to 'run' to match plan answer; orchestrator wants the semantic correctness of this checked (run re-plans; sprint consumes the just-created spec).
